content.problemStatement:
Chef feels comfortable depending on the temperature and whether or not he is wearing a jacket.


Chef feels comfortable **without a jacket** if and only if the temperature is greater than or equal to AAA.
Chef feels comfortable **with a jacket** if and only if the temperature is less than or equal to BBB.
It is guaranteed that A≤BA \leq BA≤B.
Chef is **not wearing a jacket initially**.
You are given the temperature TiT_iTi​ for the next NNN days.

Chef can choose to wear or remove his jacket any number of times, but each time he puts on the jacket is counted as one action.

Find the **minimum number of times Chef needs to wear a jacket** so that he feels comfortable on all NNN days.


Input Format

The first line contains a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
For each test case:
The first line contains three space-separated integers NNN, AAA, and BBB.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers T1,T2,…,TNT_1, T_2, \ldots, T_NT1​,T2​,…,TN​, where TiT_iTi​ is the temperature on the iii-th day.


Output Format
For each test case, output a single integer — the minimum number of times Chef needs to wear a jacket.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
For Test case 1: N=5,A=20,B=30N=5, A=20, B=30N=5,A=20,B=30 and temperatures are [15,25,35,28,10][15,25,35,28,10][15,25,35,28,10].

Day 1: 15<A15 < A15<A, Chef must wear a jacket. (wear count = 1)
Day 2: 252525 lies in [A,B][A,B][A,B], Chef can keep the jacket on.
Day 3: 35>B35 > B35>B, Chef must remove the jacket.
Day 4: 282828 lies in [A,B][A,B][A,B], Chef may stay without a jacket.
Day 5: 10<A10 < A10<A, Chef must wear a jacket again. (wear count = 2)

Minimum number of times Chef wears a jacket is 222.
For Test case 2: N=4,A=10,B=15N=4, A=10, B=15N=4,A=10,B=15 and temperatures are [12,9,15,16][12,9,15,16][12,9,15,16].

Day 1: 121212 lies in [A,B][A,B][A,B], Chef stays without a jacket.
Day 2: 9<A9 < A9<A, Chef must wear a jacket. (wear count = 1)
Day 3: 15≤B15 \le B15≤B, Chef keeps the jacket on.
Day 4: 16>B16 > B16>B, Chef removes the jacket.

Minimum number of times Chef wears a jacket is 111.
